input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.7.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.7.3.1
            TITLE: adjustable tuning or throttling devices are permitted.

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.7.3.1: Adjustable tuning or throttling devices are permitted.
IC.7.3.1 Adjustable tuning or throttling devices are permitted.

final_answer: Adjustable tuning or throttling devices are permitted.
